plan: Greet the agent and provide user ID yara_garcia_1905 and reservation HXDUBJ, asking to make changes to the reservation
Request to change the outgoing flight to a nonstop flight on the next day, with departure after 8am and before 9pm
Request to also move the return flight from SFO back by one day, also with departure after 8am and before 9pm
Request to upgrade both flights to business class and add 2 checked bags
If the agent mentions any change fees, state that you have travel insurance and the fees should be waived per the policy on the website, and be persistent about this
If fees cannot be waived and the total exceeds $200, ask to keep business class only for the outgoing leg and downgrade the return to economy to reduce costs
If that is still not possible or still exceeds $200, agree to economy class for both legs
Confirm all changes and agree to pay any remaining balance using the original form of payment on file
